pixel_id.label: Pixel ID
pixel_id.description: The Pixel ID for your Snapchat Ad Account. **Required for web and offline events**.

snap_app_id.label: Snap App ID
snap_app_id.description: The Snap App ID associated with your app. This is a unique code generated in Snapchat Ads Manager and included in your MMP dashboard. **Required for app events**.

app_id.label: App ID
app_id.description: The unique ID assigned for a given application. It should be numeric for iOS, and the human interpretable string for Android. **Required for app events**.

reportConversionEvent.title: Report Conversion Event
reportConversionEvent.description: Report events directly to Snapchat. Data shared can power Snap solutions such as custom audience targeting, campaign optimization, Dynamic Ads, and more.

event_name.label: Event Name
event_name.description: The conversion event type. For custom events, you must use one of the predefined event types (i.e. CUSTOM_EVENT_1). Please refer to the possible event types in [Snapchat Marketing API docs](https://marketingapi.snapchat.com/docs/conversion.html#conversion-parameters).

event_id.label: Event ID
event_id.description: If you are reporting events via more than one method (Snap Pixel, App Ads Kit, Conversions API) you should use the same event_id across all methods. Please refer to the [Snapchat Marketing API docs](https://marketingapi.snapchat.com/docs/conversion.html#deduplication) for information on how this field is used for deduplication against Snap Pixel SDK and App Adds Kit events.

event_time.label: Event Timestamp
event_time.description: The Epoch timestamp for when the conversion happened. The timestamp cannot be more than 7 days in the past.

action_source.label: Action Source
action_source.description: This field allows you to specify where your conversions occurred.

user_data.label: User Data
user_data.description: These parameters are a set of identifiers Snapchat can use for targeted attribution. You must provide at least one of the following parameters in your request.

externalId.label: External ID
externalId.description: Any unique ID from the advertiser, such as loyalty membership IDs, user IDs, and external cookie IDs. You can send one or more external IDs for a given event.

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: A phone number. Include only digits with country code, area code, and number. Remove symbols, letters, and any leading zeros. In addition, always include the country code, even if all of the data is from the same country, as the country code is used for matching.

gender.label: Gender
gender.description: Gender in lowercase. Either f or m.

dateOfBirth.label: Date of Birth
dateOfBirth.description: A date of birth given as year, month, and day. Example: 19971226 for December 26, 1997.

city.label: City
city.description: A city in lowercase without spaces or punctuation. Example: menlopark.

state.label: State
state.description: A two-letter state code in lowercase. Example: ca.

zip.label: Zip Code
zip.description: A five-digit zip code for United States. For other locations, follow each country`s standards.

country.label: Country
country.description: A two-letter country code in lowercase.

client_ip_address.label: Client IP Address
client_ip_address.description: The IP address of the browser corresponding to the event.

client_user_agent.label: Client User Agent
client_user_agent.description: The user agent for the browser corresponding to the event. This is required if action source is “website”.

subscriptionID.label: Subscription ID
subscriptionID.description: The subscription ID for the user in this transaction.

leadID.label: Lead ID
leadID.description: This is the identifier associated with your Snapchat Lead Ad.

madid.label: Mobile Ad Identifier
madid.description: Mobile ad identifier (IDFA or AAID) of the user who triggered the conversion event. Segment will normalize and hash this value before sending to Snapchat. [Snapchat requires](https://marketingapi.snapchat.com/docs/conversion.html#conversion-parameters) that every payload contain values for Email or Phone Number or Mobile Ad Identifier or both IP Address and User Agent fields. Also see [Segment documentation](https://segment.com/docs/connections/destinations/catalog/actions-snap-conversions/#required-parameters-and-hashing).

sc_click_id.label: Click ID
sc_click_id.description: The ID value stored in the landing page URL's `&ScCid=` query parameter. Using this ID improves ad measurement performance. We also encourage advertisers who are using `click_id` to pass the full url in the `page_url` field. For more details, please refer to [Sending a Click ID](#sending-a-click-id)

sc_cookie1.label: uuid_c1 Cookie
sc_cookie1.description: Unique user ID cookie. If you are using the Pixel SDK, you can access a cookie1 by looking at the _scid value.

idfv.label: Identifier for Vendor
idfv.description: IDFV of the user’s device. Segment will normalize and hash this value before sending to Snapchat.

app_data.label: App Data
app_data.description: These fields support sending app events to Snapchat through the Conversions API.

advertiser_tracking_enabled.label: Advertiser Tracking Enabled
advertiser_tracking_enabled.description:
*Required for app events*
              Use this field to specify ATT permission on an iOS 14.5+ device. Set to 0 for disabled or 1 for enabled.

application_tracking_enabled.label: Application Tracking Enabled
application_tracking_enabled.description:
*Required for app events*
              A person can choose to enable ad tracking on an app level. Your SDK should allow an app developer to put an opt-out setting into their app. Use this field to specify the person's choice. Use 0 for disabled, 1 for enabled.

custom_data.label: Custom Data
custom_data.description: The custom data object can be used to pass custom properties.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency for the value specified as ISO 4217 code.

num_items.label: Number of Items
num_items.description: The number of items when checkout was initiated.

order_id.label: Order ID
order_id.description: Order ID tied to the conversion event. Please refer to the [Snapchat Marketing API docs](https://marketingapi.snapchat.com/docs/conversion.html#deduplication) for information on how this field is used for deduplication against Snap Pixel SDK and App Ads Kit events.

search_string.label: Search String
search_string.description: The text string that was searched for.

sign_up_method.label: Sign Up Method
sign_up_method.description: A string indicating the sign up method.

value.label: Value
value.description: Total value of the purchase. This should be a single number. Can be overriden using the 'Track Purchase Value Per Product' field.

checkin_date.label: Check-In Date
checkin_date.description: The desired hotel check-in date in the hotel's time-zone. Accepted formats are YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmTZD and YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssTZD

destination_airport.label: Destination Airport
destination_airport.description: The destination airport. Make sure to use the IATA code of the airport

country.label: Country
country.description: The country based on the location the user intends to visit

city.label: City
city.description: The city based on the location the user intends to visit

region.label: Region
region.description: This could be the state, district, or region of interest to the user

neighborhood.label: Neighborhood
neighborhood.description: The neighborhood the user is interested in

departing_departure_date.label: Departing Departure Date
departing_departure_date.description: The starting date and time for travel

departing_arrival_date.label: Departing Arrival Date
departing_arrival_date.description: The arrival date and time at the destination for the travel

origin_airport.label: Origin Airport
origin_airport.description: The official IATA code of origin airport

returning_departure_date.label: Returning Departure Date
returning_departure_date.description: The starting date and time of the return journey

returning_arrival_date.label: Returning Arrival Date
returning_arrival_date.description: The date and time when the return journey is complete

hotel_score.label: Hotel Score
hotel_score.description: This represents the hotels score relative to other hotels to an advertiser

preferred_neighborhoods.label: Preferred Neighborhoods
preferred_neighborhoods.description: Any preferred neighborhoods for the stay

preferred_star_ratings.label: Preferred Star Ratings
preferred_star_ratings.description: The minimum and maximum hotel star rating supplied as a tuple. This is what the user would use for filtering hotels

data_processing_options.label: Data Processing Options
data_processing_options.description: The Data Processing Options to send to Snapchat. If set to true, Segment will send an array to Snapchat indicating events should be processed with Limited Data Use (LDU) restrictions.

data_processing_options_country.label: Data Processing Country
data_processing_options_country.description: A country that you want to associate to the Data Processing Options. Accepted values are 1, for the United States of America, or 0, to request that Snapchat geolocates the event using IP address. This is required if Data Processing Options is set to true. If nothing is provided, Segment will send 0.

data_processing_options_state.label: Data Processing State
data_processing_options_state.description: A state that you want to associate to the Data Processing Options. Accepted values are 1000, for California, or 0, to request that Snapchat geolocates the event using IP address. This is required if Data Processing Options is set to true. If nothing is provided, Segment will send 0.

event_source_url.label: Event Source URL
event_source_url.description: The URL of the web page where the event took place.

products.label: Products
products.description: Use this field to send details of mulitple products / items. This field overrides individual 'Item ID', 'Item Category' and 'Brand' fields. Note: total purchase value is tracked using the 'Price' field

item_id.label: Item ID
item_id.description: Identfier for the item. International Article Number (EAN) when applicable, or other product or category identifier.

item_category.label: Category
item_category.description: Category of the item. This field accepts a string.

brand.label: Brand
brand.description: Brand associated with the item. This field accepts a string.

click_id.label: [Deprecated] Click ID
click_id.description: Deprecated. Use User Data sc_click_id field.

currency.label: [Deprecated] Currency
currency.description: Deprecated. Use Custom Data currency field.

device_model.label: [Deprecated] Device Model
device_model.description: Deprecated. Use App Data deviceName field.

email.label: [Deprecated] Email
email.description: Deprecated. Use User Data email field.

idfv.label: [Deprecated] Identifier for Vendor
idfv.description: Deprecated. Use User Data idfv field.

ip_address.label: [Deprecated] IP Address
ip_address.description: Deprecated. Use User Data client_ip_address field.

mobile_ad_id.label: [Deprecated] Mobile Ad Identifier
mobile_ad_id.description: Deprecated. Use User Data madid field.

number_items.label: [Deprecated] Number of Items
number_items.description: Deprecated. Use Custom Data num_items field.

os_version.label: [Deprecated] OS Version
os_version.description: Deprecated. Use App Data version field.

page_url.label: [Deprecated] Page URL
page_url.description: Deprecated. Use Event Source URL field.

phone_number.label: [Deprecated] Phone Number
phone_number.description: Deprecated. Use User Data phone field.

price.label: [Deprecated] Price
price.description: Deprecated. Use Custom Data value field.

search_string.label: [Deprecated] Search String
search_string.description: Deprecated. Use Custom Data search_string field.

sign_up_method.label: [Deprecated] Sign Up Method
sign_up_method.description: Deprecated. Use Custom Data sign_up_method field.

transaction_id.label: [Deprecated] Transaction ID
transaction_id.description: Deprecated. Use Custom Data order_id field.

user_agent.label: [Deprecated] User Agent
user_agent.description: Deprecated. Use User Data client_user_agent field.

uuid_c1.label: [Deprecated] uuid_c1 Cookie
uuid_c1.description: Deprecated. Use User Data sc_cookie1 field.

snapPlugin.title: Snap Browser Plugin
snapPlugin.description: Enriches all Segment payloads with Snap click_id Querystring and _scid Cookie values
snapPlugin.defaultSubscription: type = "track" or type = "identify" or type = "page" or type = "group" or type = "alias"

presets.name: Snap Browser Plugin
presets.subscribe: type = "track" or type = "identify" or type = "group" or type = "page" or type = "alias"
